kw.name: Comment
kw.arg: Ce test crée un utilisateur valide et vérifie l’ID généré
kw.doc: Displays the given messages in the log file as keyword arguments.

kw.name: Create User
Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Session
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Get Session' found. Did you mean: RequestsLibrary.GET On Session
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Get Session' found. Did you mean: RequestsLibrary.GET On Session

kw.msg: ${status} = False
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://fakestoreapi.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://fakestoreapi.com/users path_url=/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '287', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "john@gmail.com", "username": "johnd", "password": "123456", "name": {"firstname": "John", "lastname": "Doe"}, "address": {"city": "kilcoole", "street": "7835 new road", "zipcode": "12926-3874", "geolocation": {"lat": "-37.3159", "long": "81.1496"}}, "phone": "1-570-236-7033"}'

${resp} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.msg: ${response} = <Response [200]>

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.msg: ${USER_ID} = 11
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
